## X-Sense Home Security v1.3.13.12

### Alarm Sensors
- Maps live `activate` and `isActivate` alarm payloads into `alarmStatus` when X-Sense does not send `alarmStatus` directly.
- Allows Smoke Detected and other alarm-status binary sensors to update when the app reports an alarm through the activation field.
- Applies the same alarm-state mapping to station-level and child-device state payloads.

### Validation
- Adds regression coverage for active, inactive, and child-device alarm payloads.
- Confirms the full test suite passes with the alarm-state parser change.
